title: Cancel Order
description: This order will be cancelled. Please provide a reason (required for audit).
reasonPlaceholder: Enter the reason for cancelling this order...

disposition.title: Collected payments: {amount}
disposition.hint: This order has collected money. Choose what happens to it when the order is cancelled.

REFUND.label: Refund the customer
REFUND.description: Creates refund requests for each payment; they follow the normal refund approval flow.

STORE_CREDIT.label: Convert to store credit
STORE_CREDIT.description: Issues an active credit note the customer can use on future orders.

KEEP_ON_ACCOUNT.label: Keep the money (cancellation charge)
KEEP_ON_ACCOUNT.description: Retains the collected amount. Requires refund-approval permission and is recorded in the audit trail.
